steps.title: Identify the defining outcome
steps.content: The passage explains that slowed currents create “calmer waters where animals can take shelter.” The blank needs a word that characterizes this environment.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content: “Tranquil” conveys a state of peace and stillness that animals seek for refuge. The other three choices (surprising, imaginative, dangerous) don't align with the peaceful, sheltered waters described. That matches choice B — B is correct.
